targets.expr:
sum by (service) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator",uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[30s]))
or on(service) (0 * max by (service) (up{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator"}))

# Metrics:
# - http_server_requests_seconds_count
# - kube_deployment_spec_replicas
# Meaning:
# - Effective request pressure handled by the desired replica budget of each service.
# RL use-case:
# - Workload pressure feature aligned with the `replicas` state signal.
(
  sum by (service) (
    rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator",uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[30s])
  )
  /
  clamp_min(
    max by (service) (
      label_replace(
        kube_deployment_spec_replicas{namespace="mini-ecommerce", deployment!=""},
        "service",
        "$1",
        "deployment",
        "^(.*)$"
      )
    ),
    1
  )
)
or on(service) (
  0 * max by (service) (up{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator"})
)

# Metrics:
# - http_server_requests_seconds_bucket
# Meaning:
# - Fraction of 30s p95-latency windows in the last 5 minutes that breached 300ms.
# RL use-case:
# - SLA breach signal for state tracking and reward shaping during self-healing.
avg_over_time(
  (
    histogram_quantile(
      0.95,
      sum by (service, le) (
        rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator",uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[1m])
      )
    ) > bool 0.3
  )[5m:30s]
)
or on(service) (
  0 * max by (service) (up{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator"})
)

# Metrics:
# - http_server_requests_seconds_bucket
# Meaning:
# - Change in p95 latency versus 1 minute ago, expressed in milliseconds.
# RL use-case:
# - Reward delta signal showing whether recovery actions are improving latency.
(
  (
    histogram_quantile(
      0.95,
      sum by (service, le) (
        rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator",uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[1m])
      )
    )
  )
  -
  (
    histogram_quantile(
      0.95,
      sum by (service, le) (
        rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator",uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[1m] offset 1m)
      )
    )
  )
) * 1000
or on(service) (
  0 * max by (service) (up{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator"})
)

# Metrics:
# - kube_pod_created
# Meaning:
# - Number of pods created in the last 5 minutes for each service.
# RL use-case:
# - Stability signal to capture rollout storms, rescheduling churn, and self-healing side effects.
sum by (service) (
  label_replace(
    max by (pod) ((time() - kube_pod_created{namespace="mini-ecommerce", pod=~".+-[a-f0-9]{8,10}-[a-z0-9]{5}"} < bool 300)),
    "service",
    "$1",
    "pod",
    "^(.*)-[a-f0-9]{8,10}-[a-z0-9]{5}$"
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    max by (pod) ((time() - kube_pod_created{namespace="mini-ecommerce", pod=~".+-[0-9]+"} < bool 300)),
    "service",
    "$1",
    "pod",
    "^(.*)-[0-9]+$"
  )
)
or on(service) (
  0 * max by (service) (up{job="mini-ecommerce-actuator"})
)

panels.title: Time Since Last Restart by Pod

targets.expr:
# Metrics:
# - kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_timestamp
# - kube_pod_info
# Meaning:
# - Seconds elapsed since the last observed container termination for each pod.
# RL use-case:
# - Stability freshness signal for distinguishing recent failures from recovered pods.
clamp_min(
  time() - max by (namespace, pod) (
    kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_timestamp{namespace="mini-ecommerce"} > 0
  ),
  0
)
or on(namespace, pod) (
  0 * max by (namespace, pod) (kube_pod_info{namespace="mini-ecommerce"})
)
